name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20For=20#BidenHarris?=
subject: Civil Rights Are On The Line
body:
We have 3 days left to meet our goal and help elect new leadership to Congress to fight for Joe Biden's vision. | | | |
---
|
---
| [Chip in ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=c1fd282ec4&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in ")
---
| | |
### Friend,

The stakes in this election could not be higher. So much is on the line for all of us; healthcare, women's rights, and equal justice for all.

Working parents in our country have seen unprecedented challenges during Covid and as a response, Joe Biden introduced a $775 billion plan aimed at easing the burden on families who are struggling to care for their children. Joe understands that now is the time to solve America’s parenting crisis.

His policy agenda is the most progressive of any Democratic presidential nominee in decades and this is the first time we have seen a presidential candidate make the caregiving workforce a top priority and a third plank of his economic recovery plan.

Joe can't do this without you and the women running for Congress who will vote to make his plan a reality for the millions of American workers raising children.

We have 3 days left to meet our last deadline before Election Day. Can you [chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=47af3f4534&e=3f151f8b74) what you can to help us elect, Joe?

Thank you!

Simona Grace
Founder, Moms in Office

name: MJ Hegar for Texas
subject: So much is on the line this election →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
And we can't afford to lose, Peter.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cf4/7f51f7bc/44196264/4efa4607/908570310/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | We need your help, Peter.

If MJ is elected, we can **FLIP THE SENATE** and **DEFEND THE SUPREME COURT.**

We can't afford to not succeed. Affordable health care is on the line. Workers' rights are on the line. The battle against climate change is on the line. LGBTQ+ rights are on the line. Common-sense gun safety laws are on the line. Reproductive freedom is on the line. If we don't win in November, we could lose them all.

Texas is the biggest battleground state in the country. The results of this election could decide control of the Senate and by extension, the Supreme Court, so we NEED to make sure MJ wins. This campaign is powered by people just like you, and we're closer than ever to beating Sen. Cornyn.

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Trump's chance to expose Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
I hope you tune in Tuesday night to watch the presidential debate. We know Joe Biden will come out swinging and the liberal mainstream media will be on his side. Peter, will you help me defend President Trump and fight back against the liberal media's smears?
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NjQ3ODIS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjM2OTY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

I hope you tune in Tuesday night to watch the presidential debate.

**President Trump has accomplished more in the last 47 months than Joe Biden did during his 47 years in Washington.** Biden has been avoiding the media and hasn't had a single tough interview, but during the debate he will finally have to answer for his support of the radical leftist rioters and his son Hunter's corrupt dealings with China.

**We know Joe Biden will come out swinging and the liberal mainstream media will be on his side. **

[**Peter, will you help me defend President Trump and fight back against the liberal media 's smears?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NjQ3ODIS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjM2OTY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Stand with Trump](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NjQ3ODIS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjM2OTY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

It is critical that we stand with President Trump and support him this week.

**The best way we can support President Trump is by fighting back against the far left 's attacks and pointing out the dangers of electing Joe Biden. That's why I'm running ads to hit Joe Biden. **

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NjQ3ODIS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjM2OTY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

With the first debate this Tuesday, Americans are starting to tune into the race and we need to stay on offense and expose Joe Biden as a puppet of the radical Left.

I'm sure you will join me in cheering on President Trump during the debate. [**Can I count on you to help me have the president 's back?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NjQ3ODIS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjM2OTY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

With your help, I can keep running ads to support President Trump and make sure that he is re-elected to serve us for four more years.
_****_
[Stand with Trump](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NjQ3ODIS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjM2OTY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

In service,
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NjQ3ODIS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjM2OTY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Tom Cotton
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NjQ3ODIS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjM2OTY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

****
| | | | | ** ** | Paid for by Cotton for Senate
---

2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

_Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch._
**
[Privacy Policy](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NjQ3ODIS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjM2OTY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Unsubscribe](http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/CottonSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=43564782&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTg0MjM2OTY3NAS2&spReportId=MTg0MjM2OTY3NAS2)**

The Congressional Black Caucus works to increase the number of African Americans in the U.S. Congress, support non-Black candidates that champion our interests, and promote African American participation in the political process.

We're committed to getting African Americans and non-Black allies elected to the highest positions in Congress and activated at the polls to advance issues that matter in our communities.

By joining this grassroots movement, you are helping uplift African Americans in the political process. Our campaign is powered by supporters like you. ---
| | |
### Friend,

The stakes in this election could not be higher. So much is on the line for all of us; healthcare, women's rights, and equal justice for all.

Working parents in our country have seen unprecedented challenges during Covid and as a response, Joe Biden introduced a $775 billion plan aimed at easing the burden on families who are struggling to care for their children. Joe understands that now is the time to solve America’s parenting crisis.

His policy agenda is the most progressive of any Democratic presidential nominee in decades and this is the first time we have seen a presidential candidate make the caregiving workforce a top priority and a third plank of his economic recovery plan.

Joe can't do this without you and the women running for Congress who will vote to make his plan a reality for the millions of American workers raising children.

We have 3 days left to meet our last deadline before Election Day. Can you [chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b15aea1058&e=3f151f8b74) what you can to help us elect, Joe?

Thank you!

Simona Grace
Founder, Moms in Office

I want to display your name LIVE during the Presidential Debate. I want to have a RECORD-BREAKING 1,000,000 American names displayed for the entire Nation to see. | | CRUCIAL DEADLINE ALERT

Friend-

Tomorrow at 11:59pm marks the last quarterly deadline before the election.

The campaign funds I raised in July, August and September will be publicly reported for everyone, from political observers to the media to the President, to see. If we reach our goal, we will not only enhance our momentum and attract media attention, but can turn this seat from "Toss Up" to "Lean Republican."

[We need every resource NOW to make sure we can air our final commercials, call the remaining voters, and ensure we take back this seat in just 35 days, giving our community the representation they deserve.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=317A503A1A6773)

But in order to do this, we have to raise $24,820 in just under 40 hours.
---
| | |

| | |

| | You have been one of my top supporters in my race for Congress... Can I count on you to help reach our deadline goal?

A Nancy Pelosi-controlled PAC and far-left dark money groups are lining up millions more during the month of October to help my opponent by continuing their nasty smear campaign against me. We can NOT allow these dishonest groups to buy our district.

[With just 35 days left until Election Day and less than 40 hours until our CRUCIAL deadline, I need your help.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=317A503A1A6773)

We’ve talked a lot about our campaign being people-powered. So, I wanted to take a moment to really show how integral grassroots donors are to this campaign.
* More than 12,000 people have contributed to our campaign over the last year.

* That’s a lot of folks chipping in $10, $20, or whatever they can. And our online average gift last month was just $36.

* Our donors include teachers, nurses, school bus drivers, servicemen and women, and retired folks.

Support from grassroots donors is essential to fighting off attacks from our opponent. You're also helping us organize folks on the ground to get out the vote for Josh before November 3.
**Now we need folks like you (not corporate PACs and special interest groups) to chip in before midnight on September 30. It’s the most important deadline of the campaign, and we can really use your help reaching our end of quarter fundraising goal.**
[_**So, if you can, chip in $36 before midnight tomorrow.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19696176/254094101/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200929EOQ7_NG_all_ld_l2&amount=36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWY3MTBlZi01ZDAyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3iTvr6O_50R4YyKoqr5LGSave3anmaGJ-47Q3BYQtFM=)

name: Betsy
subject: Donor match today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Peter, _**The very first presidential debate of 2020 is happening right here in our backyard tonight because both Vice President Biden and Trump know that Ohio is now a toss-up. To celebrate, an angel donor has agreed to match the first $1,000 donated today!**_ _****_ The latest Ohio polls show Biden leading, and that means my race for this open State Senate seat is so very winnable! And that's incredibly important with the Ohio legislature's ability to re-draw the statehouse and congressional districts and get rid of gerrymandering next year. We only flip Ohio if we turn out votes up and down the ballot, which is why I need your support in this race for State Senate. Our poll showed me statistically tied with my opponent this summer, and it showed that to win I need to make sure my message reaches voters through election day. A few days ago, we started at a budget gap of over $11,000.. **Now, we need just $3,317 by midnight on Wednesday!** [**Can you chip in $20 today and our angel donor will match it and make it $40!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZSiyS7QSlSXIm6KjsFMa2Yk5MvTK4ySf56j32-uvqM4=/i9aRi2se9lnOe10zk6d90iCH6lQ0slhZi1OUk4V6p1k=?refcode=septeoq4&amount=20) We can make history. We can make Ohio politics reflect the Ohio people. But we need you. Sincerely, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZSiyS7QSlSXIm6KjsFMa2Yk5MvTK4ySf56j32-uvqM4=/kI_NFzWQ3xM2pqpqaTjX8hygQGrC7vxi_Tuj2SwbYzc=?refcode=septeoq4&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZSiyS7QSlSXIm6KjsFMa2Yk5MvTK4ySf56j32-uvqM4=/kI_NFzWQ3xM2pqpqaTjX8hygQGrC7vxi_Tuj2SwbYzc=?refcode=septeoq4&amount=50) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZSiyS7QSlSXIm6KjsFMa2Yk5MvTK4ySf56j32-uvqM4=/kI_NFzWQ3xM2pqpqaTjX8hygQGrC7vxi_Tuj2SwbYzc=?refcode=septeoq4&amount=25) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZSiyS7QSlSXIm6KjsFMa2Yk5MvTK4ySf56j32-uvqM4=/kI_NFzWQ3xM2pqpqaTjX8hygQGrC7vxi_Tuj2SwbYzc=?refcode=septeoq4&amount=100) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZSiyS7QSlSXIm6KjsFMa2Yk5MvTK4ySf56j32-uvqM4=/kI_NFzWQ3xM2pqpqaTjX8hygQGrC7vxi_Tuj2SwbYzc=?refcode=septeoq4) _**Please note: Our mailing address changed!**_ If you'd like to send a check, please send it to: Friends of Betsy Rader 626 Franklin Ave PO Box #801 Kent, OH 44240

I’m running for office to represent your interests. I want to preserve and expand access to health care. I want to ensure that folks can find good paying jobs. And I want to be a voice for your concerns.

|

Yesterday, my team sent you an email about why Pete Sessions is wrong for Texas -- from his possible criminal conduct to his negligence. Texans deserve better. I’m running for office to represent your interests. I want to preserve and expand access to health care. I want to ensure that folks can find good paying jobs. And I want to be a voice for your concerns. **But I can’t win without your support. I'm running for Congress to fight back. The radical left's **politics** can't be allowed to come before our **values**.Are you with me?Thanks,Scott Fitzgerald

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Heard of the October Surprise
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ever_heard_october_surprise&n=1)
---
Peter \-- There's a saying in politics. Every October of an election year, a bombshell news story comes out that changes the dynamics of the political environment. **Imagine you had the ability to create the Minnesota October Surprise! Let me explain.** Legislators are going to be called back to the Capitol one more time before the election when Tyrant-wannabe Walz extends his "emergency" for another 30 days. That date will most likely be October 9th. In a minute, I'm going to ask you to donate to help shape the next month of politics. But first, let me explain the two scenarios that likely will occur. Scenario 1: The four Democrats needed to flip and vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers will see the writing on the wall from the heat we bring, and vote the right way. Then we go into November's election with a splintered Democrat party in Minnesota. Or... Scenario 2: The Democrats who are standing in the way of our liberties and economy will once again protect their Party's governor and vote against the End Walz' Powers Resolution. In that case, Action 4 Liberty takes our message directly to tens of thousands of voters in their districts so voters kick them out of office on November 3rd. Action 4 Liberty will play this commercial and others from now until election day if it comes down to that. [](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_tabke_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ever_heard_october_surprise&n=2) We're at a critical time in the battle to restore our liberties and End Walz' Emergency Powers. Everything that happens now will impact the important November election. We still need 4 Democrats to flip their vote if we want to End Walz' Powers. **Democrat politicians Brad Tabke, Dan Wolgamott, Rob Ecklund and Jeff Brand better vote for their people and not their Party's governor in October or they better start looking for another job!** Action 4 Liberty has the commercial, online ads, mailers and phone callers lined up and ready to go. [We are ready to launch a full on assault for our liberties, will you help](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ever_heard_october_surprise&n=3)? Our message is going directly to voters in their districts so they know exactly how they are killing businesses and trampling on our civil liberties. As politicians like Brad Tabke are campaigning, we'll be there telling voters in 55A how Brad puts Walz ahead of them! _Walz is abusing his emergency powers and politicians like Brad Tabke are protecting him._ **Now I must ask for you help with a donation. Action 4 Liberty needs the resources to alert voters in Brad Tabke's district from now until election day that Tabke is killing small business and infringing on our liberties by protecting Tim Walz.** We need to inform voters in St Cloud about Dan Wolgamott, northern Minnesota about Rob Ecklund and southern Minnesota about Jeff Brand. Will you help us out?
## [SUPPORT ACTION 4 LIBERTY](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ever_heard_october_surprise&n=4)
The Legislature will be back in session soon and we can't afford to not put**maximum pressure** on Tabke and the other Democrats needed to End Walz' Emergency Powers. Help us get these commercials out to tens of thousands of voters this election season by donating today. | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ever_heard_october_surprise&n=5 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ever_heard_october_surprise&n=6)
---
We must **turn up the heat** on Brad Tabke and these other Democrats to stop protecting Walz! Let’s have them feel the political pain, instead of our beloved businesses.
When politicians see their friends like Brad Tabke suffer embarrassment in front of voters, it sends a strong message to their friends to not cross us. They either support liberty or we deliver the pain!
[**Please help us put the pressure on these politicians. Pitch in $100 NOW if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or get us a lot of air play with a generous donation of $1,000.**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ever_heard_october_surprise&n=7)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ever_heard_october_surprise&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ever_heard_october_surprise&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ever_heard_october_surprise&n=10), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Paying your taxes is patriotic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
Donald Trump has hit a new low, Peter.
Every year, hard-working people pay thousands of dollars in taxes. Families just scraping by pay their taxes. Teenagers, working their first-ever minimum-wage jobs, pay their taxes. For _10 of the last 15 years_ , Donald J. Trump has**not** paid his taxes.
A self-proclaimed billionaire who spent $70,000 on hair styling for TV appearances should**not** be paying _less_ in taxes than working families. That's why I've been fighting for tax code reform from my position on the Ways and Means Committee.
[**With my campaign 's final FEC fundraising deadline tomorrow, will you donate $5 right now to help me get re-elected so I can continue this fight for working families?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/O-IkJp0c8f1sbOzRfGuBtrxnDUK2eamX4wUJauI3Pzg=/6KqqbfD0PSnjYOPqMh2RaD6wbs9DpWkBtpq20U4wO68=?refcode=X_092920_EOQ_G)
[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/O-IkJp0c8f1sbOzRfGuBtrxnDUK2eamX4wUJauI3Pzg=/NORULK9pcNAPdtd10suc6p2jmuiyrZlFUN7UZIZ_mO8=?refcode=X_092920_EOQ_G)
In 2017, the average American family paid $750 _a month_ in federal taxes. That same year, President Trump only paid $750 for the entire _year_. The system is broken.
We need tax breaks that benefit working families and children, _not_ billionaires. In Congress, I will fight **every day** to ensure that our tax system works for everyone, not just the wealthiest 1%.
[**Stand with me by chipping in whatever you can right now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/O-IkJp0c8f1sbOzRfGuBtrxnDUK2eamX4wUJauI3Pzg=/NORULK9pcNAPdtd10suc6p2jmuiyrZlFUN7UZIZ_mO8=?refcode=X_092920_EOQ_G)
[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/O-IkJp0c8f1sbOzRfGuBtrxnDUK2eamX4wUJauI3Pzg=/NORULK9pcNAPdtd10suc6p2jmuiyrZlFUN7UZIZ_mO8=?refcode=X_092920_EOQ_G)
Thank you for stepping up,
_\-- Linda S anchez_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/O-IkJp0c8f1sbOzRfGuBtrxnDUK2eamX4wUJauI3Pzg=/q6dQ5fI0iG8eXTYuGRlMjlkfmnNlu0ojkBL1iQUvS3I=)
* * *

subject: Watch Bill O’Reilly’s LIVE debate reaction for FREE!
body:
| | Don’t miss the first presidential debate tonight!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=TIi5AeGEPxdM94RMBE-ucn9vCtbEC2S2c8UgWo_eucxCo5s1aeLmptg04VvaqHeV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200929com01&n=1)
| Peter, Tonight marks the true start of the 2020 election season. And we can’t stress enough how important the outcome is to our nation’s survival. That’s why we are offering Bill O’Reilly’s post-debate special **FOR FREE** to everyone. That’s right, following the debate you can get O’Reilly’s instant analysis **FOR FREE** on The First TV!
## No Agenda. No Cost. No Trials... No Spin!
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=TIi5AeGEPxdM94RMBE-ucn9vCtbEC2S2c8UgWo_eucxCo5s1aeLmptg04VvaqHeV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200929com01&n=2) But wait! You won’t even have to scramble to find Bill after the debate, because we’re carrying that LIVE as well on The First! Because we’re your home for the next two months for the smartest and most honest election coverage, we’re bringing you a full night of information and analysis. In fact, our coverage starts with a pre-show at 7p ET, followed by Bill’s “No Spin News” show, and then right on to the debate and the post-event special. If you want the truth, if you want honesty and curiosity, and if you’ve missed Bill’s unique brand of opinion, analysis, and fact-checking you’re going to love tonight on The First TV! So visit [www.thefirsttv.com](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GoweSYhUIVx9J-QKk29Z3MHMQDtj0O-wI_1jaOzg4ZI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200929com01&n=3) right now to check out all the ways you can watch The First, tonight’s debate, and Bill’s post-debate special...**FOR FREE**! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=TIi5AeGEPxdM94RMBE-ucn9vCtbEC2S2c8UgWo_eucxCo5s1aeLmptg04VvaqHeV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200929com01&n=4) For freedom, The First

subject: it's not looking good, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good
body:
| | | Derek, If you know me, you know I’m an eternal optimist. But even I can’t sugarcoat this: **With less than 48 hours until the most important fundraising deadline of 2020, we’re still $18,438 short of our $20,000 fundraising goal.** The country is counting on Virginia to send Democrats to office up and down the ballot. If we fail, Donald Trump gets four more years, Democrats lose Congress, and the Supreme Court gets packed with right-wing Justices for decades to come. I’m doing everything in my power to stop all that and right now I need your help. **[Please contribute anything you can and help us reach our deadline goal by Wednesday at midnight.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkLs34ip987PAXxWSApnt61Mt9g5vRU3UGucE28R5LzsXUnMa6ZlE_3R1tWqAFHCOOVNhRu_NrlGYa2H8DDuOLmrONnUxqumHHTUoCtcnrOQ5UOYea1ZEPrV1wY9f-cxtxdcyzefZPmhggN6d09bpKNRSomDTYln4F4By1v4pG9tde1qfX9v9wKnX7tTzdXVjZkuIa9_nhsyWEVxiv72DpPUb_pNSnEunSha_qCDKP9TCD4QqJorVmjwcaPThwfKQoUBAXDT_15IaVdLLOI2yyBPWzr97VuYhwRKfz0faECf6l1MgVv3eZSBASY6THXz_p/35l/LIx3UxAqTPyL4aRjlsCagA/h0/iwPzXfPqPdup5dSszYeb1p-P6h3I-X_OzgGYoViIbeI)** Thanks ahead of time for supporting my effort. name: Mary Mancini
subject: the most important deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
September end of month 2020 will go down as the most important fundraising deadline we’ve ever had. We now have the month of October left to Get Out The Vote, and then it’s November 3 rd . This isn’t just about electing Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. We need to be electing every possible Democrat, up and down the ticket. And to do that we need to show up in record numbers.
That’s why I’m asking you, from the bottom of my heart, to donate today. If ever there was a time to give resources to the TNDP, now is it. We are doing everything we can to mobilize Democrats – but we need to do more and we need your help to do it.
From healthcare to the Supreme Court. From LGBTQ+ rights to Black Lives Matter. From respecting our military to saving our economy. From job security to collective bargaining rights. There is just too much on the ballot not to do everything we possibly can to win.
We have until midnight tomorrow to raise the $11,840 left to meet our goal – and this goal is the minimum needed to execute our GOTV plan. So please, make a donation right now, and help us save our country. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Solutions can’t wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Donna US Congress
body:
Donna’s got what it takes.
Friends,
Donna Imam is one of the most solutions-oriented candidates I've ever spoken to, which is no surprise as she's an engineer and entrepreneur. Like me, Donna is not a politician. But when she sees a large-scale problem, she puts her expertise to work to solve it.
**[Let’s fight for Donna so she can fight for us. Contribute $5, $10, or $50 dollars today to help send her to Congress in November>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19705317/254135432/1583936403?refcode=em_yang_link1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzc0ZTFjYS03NTAyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BhNjWpWza0iwXzq2OM5IH3wKcc4Cz82A0pwpuORg9Lg=)**
Years ago, when Donna saw hundreds of her colleagues laid off due to automation, she founded a non-profit to help equip people for the transition. Today, Donna sees evidence of the problems we face everywhere in her community. From the unemployed veterans asking for food outside of HEB, to families forced to choose between making rent or prescription drugs, **Donna knew she couldn’t sit on the sidelines while so many Americans are struggling.**
**This race is about the past against the future.** We are building a movement to rewrite the rules to work for us, the people. **[But Donna’s GOP opponent has a million-dollar fundraising head start. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19705327/254135442/1583936403?refcode=footer_headshot&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzc0ZTFjYS03NTAyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BhNjWpWza0iwXzq2OM5IH3wKcc4Cz82A0pwpuORg9Lg=) Donna started her tech career as the first female design engineer ever hired in the 100 year history of Duncan Metering. clean_body: Donna’s got what it takes. Friends, Donna Imam is one of the most solutions-oriented candidates I've ever spoken to, which is no surprise as she's an engineer and entrepreneur. Like me, Donna is not a politician. But when she sees a large-scale problem, she puts her expertise to work to solve it. = Years ago, when Donna saw hundreds of her colleagues laid off due to automation, she founded a non-profit to help equip people for the transition. Today, Donna sees evidence of the problems we face everywhere in her community. From the unemployed veterans asking for food outside of HEB, to families forced to choose between making rent or prescription drugs, Donna knew she couldn’t sit on the sidelines while so many Americans are struggling. This race is about the past against the future. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Chip in $16 to flip the 16th
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cc8b24f05d01/chip-in-16-to-flip-the-16th?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | **I am running to flip IL-16 from red to blue.**

For too long, we have had a representative who ignores us. His office is known for snubbing constituents and being hostile to questions. He still hasn’t said a word about the derecho that ripped through the Midwest last month. He has been silent on the tensions between the Rockford police and protestors here in the district. He has gained a reputation here at home for this absenteeism, even earning himself the nickname “Absent Adam.”

When it comes to the issues, my opponent’s record is just as bad as his absenteeism. He voted against the Equality Act, which would prohibit discrimination against LGBTQ workers. He wants to overturn Roe v. Wade and do away with the right to choose. He voted against consumer protections from known pollutants and to defund the EPA. The reason for this all: **he is funded by corporate super PACs and special interest groups. **

[Click here to chip in $16 to flip IL-16 and unseat an anti-woman, anti-LGBTQ, anti-environment Congressman.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=ff8bc9ea16&e=140a9b81e7)

I am running to give this district adequate representation. We deserve so much better than a Congressman who ignored the people he is supposed to be representing. We need a representative who cares about all of their constituents, regardless of race, gender identity, or sexual orientation. When I am elected, I will fight for universal healthcare coverage, protections for LGBTQ Americans, and campaign finance reform.

**We are going to flip the 16th from a pro-Trump Republican to a progressive Democrat. But first, I need your help.**

Election Day is approaching fast, especially with early voting and vote by mail starting last week. We have to get our message out there to the voters. So we need a lot of money - and we need it ASAP.

[Can I count on you to chip in $16 to flip the 16th? ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=11dade6df6&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Brittni McGuire
subject: weeks not months
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

Right now we are looking at weeks, not months, until Election Day. This is the last end of month fundraising deadline that will matter before the election. We want to raise an additional $7,500 to help us cover GOTV costs through the election and today I’m asking for your help.
Donald Trump has made it clear that he isn’t going down without a fight. And if that fight ends up in the Supreme Court, he’s made sure that he can win it. We need to show up in record numbers, ensuring there is absolutely no margin of error if we want Trump out of office. Democrats need to mobilize, mobilize their friends, mobilize their cousins and then mobilize some more. Putting resources into our GOTV program is the absolute most important thing we can do right now. We can utilize our networks throughout the entire state to help register, and educate Democratic voters.
Can you make a donation today and help us elect Democrats up and down the ticket this November? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you!
Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: The importance of a strong public education system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
As a nation, we can realize the American dream by investing in public education. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8b685d202b&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

As a teacher, I know the importance of a strong public education system -- from early childhood all the way through college and the trades.

It is deeply concerning that the current administration has shown little regard for our nation’s public education system. The current administration has diverted funds from public schools through voucher programs and removed protections from our most vulnerable students.
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=9057c2f2d3&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Local educators agree that Hoosiers need someone to advocate in Washington for public education. Did you catch the letter from Dr. Virginia B. Calvin in [yesterday’s South Bend Tribune](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=bd2c51d7c4&e=5886ca081d)? As the former superintendent of South Bend Community School Corporation and former chancellor of Ivy Tech Community College, Dr. Calvin knows what our education system needs.

“We need Hackett representing us in Indiana’s 2nd district,” Dr. Calvin wrote in her letter.

As your representative, [I will work to strengthen our public schools, incentivize good teachers and emphasize student creativity, intellectual integrity and critical thinking skills.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=f501e111b5&e=5886ca081d)

Thank you for your support,

Pat

body:
Make a contribution today to power this movement through Election Day and beyond.
#

As we approach the final full month of our campaign, we want to take this opportunity to share with you all of the exciting work our campaign is doing.
We’re not only working around the clock to elect Mondaire, but we’re also supporting Democrats in key races up and down the ballot throughout the country.
**[We’ve set a $30,000 goal for this final FEC end-of-quarter deadline to make sure we have all the resources to continue our work. Will you make a contribution today to power this movement through Election Day and beyond?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19706861/254141512/-1084116692?refcode2=cd9ae6ed-7a02-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=em200929-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDlhZTZlZC03YTAyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kn6bfKvxZ0q0rrI1WnrVSF-q5GnEIvS5EtqeRahxBVc=)**
Here’s just some of what our team has been up to since winning the primary:
* **Mondaire sued the Trump administration _and won_** for improperly meddling with the USPS; now the agency must reverse changes that would have made it harder for millions of Americans to vote by mail.
* **He’s also been speaking out on the GOP’s craven attempts to steal control of the Supreme Court for decades** , and has been covered by national media as a leading voice on critical reforms to our court system and democracy.
* **Mondaire has endorsed six fellow Democratic House candidates across the country** — five in red-to-blue races — and our team is hosting phone banks, raising money, and headlining campaign events to support them.

**[Any dollar you can give today will go directly towards our critical work ahead of Election Day. Please help elect Mondaire and support our movement by making a contribution today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19706862/254141513/-1084116692?refcode2=cd9ae6ed-7a02-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=em200929-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDlhZTZlZC03YTAyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kn6bfKvxZ0q0rrI1WnrVSF-q5GnEIvS5EtqeRahxBVc=)**
Thank you so much for being part of this fight!
\- Team Mondaire

As we approach the final full month of our campaign, we want to take this opportunity to share with you all of the exciting work our campaign is doing. We’re not only working around the clock to elect Mondaire, but we’re also supporting Democrats in key races up and down the ballot throughout the country. = Here’s just some of what our team has been up to since winning the primary: Mondaire sued the Trump administration and won for improperly meddling with the USPS; now the agency must reverse changes that would have made it harder for millions of Americans to vote by mail. He’s also been speaking out on the GOP’s craven attempts to steal control of the Supreme Court for decades , and has been covered by national media as a leading voice on critical reforms to our court system and democracy. Mondaire has endorsed six fellow Democratic House candidates across the country — five in red-to-blue races — and our team is hosting phone banks, raising money, and headlining campaign events to support them. = Thank you so much for being part of this fight! \- Team Mondaire = | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress P.O. name: Sri@sri2020.com
subject: Last chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Dear friends and supporters,

This is it. I don’t mean this is it, as in the final financial deadline for the campaign on September 30. I mean this is it for our country, for our children’s education, our economy, our health, our rule of law, and our right to even have a democracy.

I wish I was being dramatic, but we know the costs of having elected leaders who don’t believe in or follow science: 200,000 dead, 50 million unemployed, 1 out of 6 small businesses have gone under, millions of children not able to get a proper education. And we all know that it didn’t need to be this bad.

If you care about all of these things -- if you want to bring back reason and science, if you want to see our elected officials using power to show compassion, not cruelty, and if you want to push back against the division and hate spreading across this country with inclusion and decency -- we need you now.

In person voting starts October 13, and people are already voting by mail. There is no later.

But we also need your financial support. I wouldn’t be asking if we didn’t need it, but we do. The last deadline of the campaign is Wednesday at midnight.

We need your help and we need it now. Please give generously, because none of us want to be thinking on November 4, “I wish I had done more.” Let’s all be saying, “Thank God we did enough.”

This is the big one.

Click here to help: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.29_b1_s_all&amount=25

Thank you all,
Sri

Can you make it weekly?

Friend -- we’re just 5 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.

Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way! \

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.29_b1_s_all&amount=5&recurring=1

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.29_b1_s_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/5030e811-7002-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc/d25a0e92-7d02-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVhMGU5Mi03ZDAyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JX6FiGucqjt9dQ1mWRNreIKIkRuaEnrIG1Y83Kb6M74=&id=117373579 .

From: Josh Hawley
Date: September 28th, 2020
Subject: Democrats are MAD Dear Peter, This month alone, Democrats have made countless threats to our Constitution. **If they take the Senate back this November, they will pack the Court.** Currently, Democrats are threatening to impeach President Trump _**again**_ _**AND**_ impeach our Attorney General Bill Barr. They aren’t even trying to hide it anymore - they are the party of radicals. _**We have no choice but to fight back.**_ **This is why my team has set a quarterly fundraising goal of $15,000.** We _**must**_ hit this deadline if we want to save our country from the radical left. [**Donate $5 _HERE_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c911582dc6d143b8a94942f296ac6667&_e=FUFWYxQHDPA1hmKc1qI_aiDfMBjJm_Y9pQddVc0hSs2ZdpEudqEpVRKGFbJUqTDP5ZBOL0oTO4F5mChO0Xz6trWrlzAHIFdpptsbhz0_J_P7ijFwswK_d1Zw_T3uBkQbFGEzDcfGxqc7Ef6XA5A_kAhlSZJwC6FbKmjmtsnbqjJ2McQ9_Z2dKXUNxqD-77K9wZgToVe7yR44DtLrMvL4cQRNHbrjpSqKmiCdBGJ5mmBTv0rQ91WSby6pWc1tsF_CoN-HbucTLGydSiNUwa9uOrvsXC9czIpyzzQOsQF3P8R8BLZCbSt76qGmia675EAjWlxrUpDwOH2XGuxo3eOS_esjwzalO0PFyEIgq6t6k6Hfq7K98aPHcrYqSTlQyBKgPlu1lonvKlGmzNa4p8qQgiM72UWyz3Aw2SN5mlWHOas%3D) On top of all this, we have a _**huge**_ opportunity to fill a Supreme Court vacancy with a pro-life, conservative justice. The Democrats in the Senate are doing everything they can to stop the president from simply doing his job. It’s despicable; _**we cannot stand for it.**_ _**As a loyal patriot and a strong American, I am asking you to help our great country, to ensure we have a future of freedom for our children and grandchildren.**_ [_**Help us Keep the Senate RED! >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c911582dc6d143b8a94942f296ac6667&_e=FUFWYxQHDPA1hmKc1qI_aiDfMBjJm_Y9pQddVc0hSs2ZdpEudqEpVRKGFbJUqTDP5ZBOL0oTO4F5mChO0Xz6trWrlzAHIFdpptsbhz0_J_P7ijFwswK_d1Zw_T3uBkQbFGEzDcfGxqc7Ef6XA5A_kAhlSZJwC6FbKmjmtsnbqjJ2McQ9_Z2dKXUNxqD-77K98qAcJTjiLnC8Sg2xVXllr8qNSADhxaq96lJ0RGh2Ew3oslqSqzktrzmTNpAwh2l2yDAFlrO6xVPHNFyuZHY6HNXK3ToZxwP_iMGeYSvbcspmOzKtm4jLD6PjbjUJ2cFCbGBP8SB7ksNc7IjNGjf9M0fUqWhd2QxSVfEnb5p-LRVYowp4Fpzx4ST06YQVvdtRWkesskoHhUQVy1gQhKz6rY-0MfM4ZdaXf5piwJ2hehA%3D) Thank you for supporting America’s future. clean_body: Did Josh seem a bit revved up in his last email? Well, he is, because ... Good morning! Did Josh seem a bit revved up in his email yesterday? Well, he is, because he knows just how important these next two months will be in deciding the fate for America’s future. As Josh continues to battle on the front lines in Washington for America’s future, he needs your support so we can hit our goal before the Federal Election Commission’s quarterly fundraising deadline. Right now, we are just over $10,000 away , but there’s good news! For the next 12 hours, a group of conservatives have offered to TRIPLE MATCH ALL CONTRIBUTIONS! Please, take advantage of this amazing opportunity and help us hit our goal before the last day of September (TOMORROW!). Thank you, Team Hawley \-------Forwarded message------- From: Josh Hawley Date: September 28th, 2020 Subject: Democrats are MAD Dear Peter, This month alone, Democrats have made countless threats to our Constitution. If they take the Senate back this November, they will pack the Court. Currently, Democrats are threatening to impeach President Trump again AND impeach our Attorney General Bill Barr. They aren’t even trying to hide it anymore - they are the party of radicals. We have no choice but to fight back. This is why my team has set a quarterly fundraising goal of $15,000. We must hit this deadline if we want to save our country from the radical left. On top of all this, we have a huge opportunity to fill a Supreme Court vacancy with a pro-life, conservative justice. The Democrats in the Senate are doing everything they can to stop the president from simply doing his job. It’s despicable; we cannot stand for it. As a loyal patriot and a strong American, I am asking you to help our great country, to ensure we have a future of freedom for our children and grandchildren. Thank you for supporting America’s future. Sincerely, Josh Hawley | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Team Stanton
subject: Mark Needs Our Help Now More Than Ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
I've fought hard for you in Congress since I was elected in 2018, but too often important legislation is getting stopped in a Senate that is more focused on politics than people. Many important bills that we've passed in the House are still sitting on Mitch McConnell's desk, and he refuses to take a vote on them. Meanwhile, millions of Americans are in need of relief - they've lost jobs, housing, and are struggling to afford to buy food for their families. This is unacceptable.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/B_x2I_6IvDdGpyHG42mcBmz0Jpih_x6U2fnsBk4X1mM=/KLC09RkJ2JAxictq1fAqo-nRDBbHmVFK9WAMBqs81P0=?refcode=X_092420_EOQ_A)

[**That 's why I'm asking you to support my friend Mark Kelly in his race for the U.S. Senate in Arizona.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/B_x2I_6IvDdGpyHG42mcBmz0Jpih_x6U2fnsBk4X1mM=/oqTuVKiubAykHchwcAGXDVFmJ3RGUYPSXwg2Q8THJBs=?refcode=X_092420_EOQ_A) He has the qualifications and experience necessary to be a great public servant. Most importantly, Mark is a great person who has served his country with honor. ---

I want you to know how much I appreciate you. We’ve been doing this for three years now, and it’s no easy task. The burdens on our time, our family, our resources — it’s been a big sacrifice. But your support makes it so much easier. _We’ve made this commitment because of what is at stake._ To push back against the attacks on immigrants and people of color. To defend our voting rights and our democracy. To make sure everyone can see a doctor, have a roof over their heads, put food on the table and pursue their dreams. You may have seen some of the attacks coming Mike’s way. McCaul wants to say Mike is a “socialist” or “communist” just because he wants everyone to have health care and be able to protect the environment for our children. **These attacks are absurd** — especially during a pandemic, when access to a doctor can mean the difference between life and death, and especially as the West Coast burns and another hurricane season is upon us.
Here’s the thing — we have to make sure our message gets out, and isn’t drowned out by all the outside money McCaul’s wealthy supporters are bringing into the race. We have to let Texans know that my Mike, Mike Siegel, is the only one who is really looking out for regular people like you and me.
Here’s where you come in. I hate to say it, but this campaign will be decided by resources. Some of you have already been so generous. But we need you to dig deep to get us to the finish.

clean_body: | | = Dear friends, If you don’t know me yet, I’m Hindatu, Mike’s wife. I want you to know how much I appreciate you. We’ve been doing this for three years now, and it’s no easy task. The burdens on our time, our family, our resources — it’s been a big sacrifice. But your support makes it so much easier. We’ve made this commitment because of what is at stake. To push back against the attacks on immigrants and people of color. To defend our voting rights and our democracy. To make sure everyone can see a doctor, have a roof over their heads, put food on the table and pursue their dreams. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = You may have seen some of the attacks coming Mike’s way. McCaul wants to say Mike is a “socialist” or “communist” just because he wants everyone to have health care and be able to protect the environment for our children. These attacks are absurd — especially during a pandemic, when access to a doctor can mean the difference between life and death, and especially as the West Coast burns and another hurricane season is upon us. Here’s the thing — we have to make sure our message gets out, and isn’t drowned out by all the outside money McCaul’s wealthy supporters are bringing into the race. We have to let Texans know that my Mike, Mike Siegel, is the only one who is really looking out for regular people like you and me. Here’s where you come in. I hate to say it, but this campaign will be decided by resources. Some of you have already been so generous. But we need you to dig deep to get us to the finish. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We are doing everything we can to fight for the people of this district and this nation. Thank you for doing your part. When we work together, we are unstoppable! With love and gratitude, Hindatu | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, click . | Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress Mike Siegel for Congress PO Box 2409 Austin, Texas 78701 United States mailto:siegel@siegelfortexas.org

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20For=20Biden?=
subject: Time is Running Out...
body:
Help us elect Joe Biden and keep the house | | | |
---
|
---
| [Chip in ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=438e0ca521&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in ")
---
| | |
### Friends,

Grassroots supporters like you are building a movement to get our country out of Donald Trump's mess.

Moms in Office supports Joe Biden for President because, with his leadership and experience, we will rebuild our country. Too many families are struggling to put food on the table and take care of their children due to the lack of affordable child care. The pandemic left many without a job and without a safety net, the American people are struggling.

Joe Biden will need the House. We are supporting several great candidates for Congress who truly know what working families are up against, champions who will fight for all of us.

But time is running out before our most critical fundraising deadline on 9/30. We are in the final stages of this election and it is crucial that we meet this deadline.

**Would you help us elect Biden/Harris in November by[ chipping](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a0c28373d4&e=3f151f8b74) in what you can? **

Moms can no longer tolerate Donald Trump's reckless leadership and we need you to stand with us. Let's send a strong message because moms had had enough and the future of our children depends on us.

**Can you split a[$10](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a33bf4418a&e=3f151f8b74) donation between Joe Biden and Moms in Office? **

Thank you and stay safe!
Moms in Office

Would you help us elect Biden/Harris in November by in what you can? Moms can no longer tolerate Donald Trump's reckless leadership and we need you to stand with us. Let's send a strong message because moms had had enough and the future of our children depends on us. Can you split a donation between Joe Biden and Moms in Office? Thank you and stay safe! body:
They're hoping you won't notice.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8164%2E868730%2EDtrhiH) Friend, Reminder: The last numbers we have on the Republican Governors Association are a crowing press release on a $14.1 million haul this winter, making it the RGA's most successful quarter in a presidential election year. That's on top of the $200 million they raised in 2018 and 2019. With ballots dropping in less than three weeks, they're more energized than ever to take us down because -- as we've seen time and time again -- GOP-controlled states are setting the precedent for federal rollbacks on health care, reproductive rights, voting rights, gun violence prevention, and more. **[We can't let them win. name: Kat Cammack
subject: Calendar Alert: First Presidential Debate Tonight at 9PM!
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QbBjgq0APNVdrNMsS_kogKm0Daftt_Qzlg2mTc4JCuYrBLKyTrAqdN_1aYYzQgqy4pI_tvciocymo9VgkIOkyqhuMq6VO5FGtZf5pmss6MzPHO5Bi6p4gMWLNA8MU7CcFoD3JsH74rcFMo-M_gy2ALBnOk-xOa59FcDxNl-zpG_CDGR0IzcA6w==&c=J71K0w-ICGRg43LQtEZKiuW0mINi541-IGP_EPnwjULiQvqOlQhTsw==&ch=yilQSX5oN7Xd8R0JzpW2q-vBPF5voWJBlqLFqSnVaWkNGxb4f59MUA==)
---
| Patriot,
Did you hear? The First Presidential Debate is tonight at 9:00 pm!
Joe Biden and President Donald Trump will square off about the issues tonight, and I know I'll be watching. Will you? I'm confident that President Trump's America First policies will blow Biden out of the water.

| | **Our opponent is raising money hand-over-fist using Act Blue from out-of-state liberals. Check it out, you wouldn’t believe how many of his donors are from liberal states and even more interesting, how many are unemployed.....** **I’m not making this up. ** **Act Blue is software for Liberals that allows them to easily and without any work raise money from donors across the country. Our opponent is raising thousands of dollars using this software every month.** **Republican candidates can’t compete. ** **Our opponent can effortlessly raise money from Berkely and New York all day._I need this campaign to raise money from hard-working Montanans._** **As Troy always says, “I’d rather have a thousand $1 donations than a single $1,000 donation.”** **Please, if you can, donate to this campaign. Even $5 shows our opponent’s lobbyist colleagues that Montanans have Troy’s back.** **I can tell you, we are in the final sprint for the finish in this race. We cannot afford to lose. ** **We have all worked too hard and there is too much at stake._If you can, donate today._**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Announces Distribution of 150m Rapid Coronavirus Tests
body:
"President Trump announced on Monday that his administration will distribute 150 million Abbott coronavirus tests that produce results..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2501363d4d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Announces Distribution of 150m Rapid Coronavirus Tests**

“President Trump announced on Monday that his administration will distribute 150 million Abbott coronavirus tests that produce results in just 15 minutes,” Cassidy Morrison writes for the _Washington Examiner_.

“Trump said that 50 million tests would go to the most vulnerable communities: 18 million to nursing homes, 15 million to assisted living facilities, 10 million for hospice care providers, and nearly 1 million to historically black colleges and universities and colleges in tribal nations. Another 100 million tests will be allocated to states and territories to support efforts to reopen their economies and schools.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5d70d752e9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Judge Amy Coney Barrett, whom President Donald Trump has nominated to fill the Supreme Court vacancy created by the death of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, is a distinguished scholar whose judicial philosophy balances a commitment to originalism with a respect for precedent,” Adam Freedman writes for [_City Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9c38a99053&e=3ee4985eea).

**MORE** : “[Democrats’ big lies about Amy Coney Barrett](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac122f3934&e=3ee4985eea)”
---
|
---
| “An important piece of economic news has been overshadowed recently due to the important coverage of [the] Supreme Court . . . Released two weeks ago, the Census Bureau’s report on ‘Income and Poverty in the United States’ for 2019 clearly shows that, pre-pandemic, President Trump’s economic success blew past that of any other presidency,” Andy Puzder writes in [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7258365f82&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Minneapolis, Minnesota’s plan to defund and then disband their local police force has ‘collapsed’ according to a New York Times report from over the weekend. Some of the Minneapolis City Council members who pledged to abolish the city’s law enforcement—including the City Council president—now say they regret making that promise,” Emily Zanotti reports for [_The Daily Wire_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e0ec21c4b1&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=640a07ebcd&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2932a2f234&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=62744c566f)
---

| Peter,
**In 36 hours, we will reach our final and most critical quarterly fundraising deadline of the campaign.**
Colin Allred, backed by Nancy Pelosi and far-left interests, has built a large war chest to use against me. [Help me match them dollar for dollar!](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=16ea0d0075&e=68aaeb0998)

[So please help my campaign with a contribution of $100, $500, $1,000, or whatever you can afford to chip in.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=3f14e34a95&e=68aaeb0998)

subject: We can't let Mitch McConnell's attacks go unanswered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Friends --
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for Senate and Maggie Hassan. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.
This month, we set our biggest fundraising goal ever, 400,000 contributions, and we need to make sure we hit this goal because Mitch McConnell has pledged to spend millions on ads in Arizona against me and our campaign.
He has the money to keep these ads running right up until Election Day and we can't afford to let his attacks on us go unanswered -- we need to set the record straight.
Which is why I'm hoping that we can get 6,500 donations today, which is the number of donations we need every day this month to stay on track and hit our goal. So what do you say, everyone?
[**If you are able, will you split a $3 donation between my campaign and Maggie Hassan? clean_body: Friends -- In just a moment, I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for Senate and Maggie Hassan. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important. This month, we set our biggest fundraising goal ever, 400,000 contributions, and we need to make sure we hit this goal because Mitch McConnell has pledged to spend millions on ads in Arizona against me and our campaign. He has the money to keep these ads running right up until Election Day and we can't afford to let his attacks on us go unanswered -- we need to set the record straight. Which is why I'm hoping that we can get 6,500 donations today, which is the number of donations we need every day this month to stay on track and hit our goal. So what do you say, everyone? "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Maggie Hassan and Mark Kelly. "" "" "" "" We're funding this campaign by harnessing the power of grassroots energy -- and it's paying off big! "" Thank you again for all of your support. -- Mark ""

President Trump is taking the stage for the first time tonight debating Joe Biden. We all know that no matter how right he is, the liberal media is sure to attack him.
Will you help me fight back against the Fake News media and show President Trump that New Hampshire has his back?

The Democrats know that their path to victory runs through New Hampshire, and they’re throwing MILLIONS into this race to prop up D.C. Jeanne Shaheen.
**We need to win this seat, keep the Senate RED, and support President Trump for four more years!

name: Team Warren
subject: Tonight's debate and tomorrow's deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
For months and months, Donald Trump and Senate Republicans haven't lifted a finger to get this pandemic under control and deliver real relief to struggling families. But as soon as they saw an opport | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251ca/45c30650/1c161cb9b/66e893de/1405051088/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
For months and months, Donald Trump and Senate Republicans haven't lifted a finger to get this pandemic under control and deliver real relief to struggling families.

But as soon as they saw an opportunity to steal another Supreme Court seat, they leapt into action, getting ready to ram through a right-wing extremist for a lifetime appointment.

There's only one way to get our government working for working people again, and tha's to elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot this November. And grassroots donors like you can power those candidates to victory.

**Tomorrow's our last FEC fundraising deadline before the election. Every contribution between now and midnight tomorrow will help decide how much we can invest in organizing across the country while voters are casting their ballots.**

**[Can you chip in-- $2 or whatever makes sense for you -- to help hit our goal and elect Democrats like Elizabeth?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251ca/45c30650/1c161cb9b/66e893c1/1405051088/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjI0Rl9FT1FfREVCX1RfMjAyMDA5MjlfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV24F_EOQ_DEB_T_20200929_V1S2_P")**

Between tomorrow's deadline and tonight's debate, the next couple of days will be jam-packed.

When Joe Biden and Donald Trump take the stage tonight, we'll see a stark contrast between a champion for working people and a disgrace to our nation.

But this year's elections won't be won or lost on a debate stage. Democrats will win by organizing at the grassroots level -- in conversations and outreach that won't make the headlines but will move the needle. **The more we raise, the more people we can reach, and the more votes we can earn.**

**[So if you're in a place where you can make a financial contribution, and if you're ready to keep up the fight today and every day through November 3 and beyond, please donate by tomorrow's midnight deadline to help hit this goal.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251ca/45c30650/1c161cb9b/66e893c1/1405051088/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjI0Rl9FT1FfREVCX1RfMjAyMDA5MjlfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV24F_EOQ_DEB_T_20200929_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Fletcher Votes To Give Her Campaign Millions in Tax Dollars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Fletcher Votes To Give Her Campaign Millions in Tax Dollars**

Houston, TX - Over the past two years, 7th District residents have seen Representative Lizzie Fletcher consistently put the interests of her campaign and Nancy Pelosi ahead of the needs of her district. Among the numerous examples is Fletcher's co-sponsorship of H.R.1.

While our Nation struggles to provide the relief our small businesses and first responders need, Fletcher's bill would cost over $10 billion and [give political campaigns up to $5 million in federal funding](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e86281dc45994b368134d15254c91c2e&_e=LkMNxQ4WdtQ8V_Y7OxYo_V6ZR_ZSBmyQbhGesliSDWt6rOxb9vWthmQloAcVx2hr9RZfb082xGKExARTeUKNpSmqrTRSORxU0l8pbGlAiLAkUKImiuLb0VjjFxLAYrUW6opnAH3xVWZoywtk0hoDxcaXmrrRcFUj1moLDDxIsBiR4CyyToeGzvLI_AplZ4pjQns_SFTA3A50DmAQ0rXFwrhGh3ND88mP240_Lut1-MdkSRT2NFF3KPOcrLaxcpHWVVcIf6CBLCL7girPD2XXRfc38ei5quta656RfEDM2sTy4Xj0_m06zdAuY9oyfn8oEcDFaiuVqEghlNAyoPmTGg%3D%3D) to spend on negative advertising.

**The last thing taxpayers should have worry about is their hard-earned dollars going to politicians they don't support.**

The federal government holds an immense responsibility as the steward of Americans' tax dollars, and politicians in Washington should cut spending and conserve taxpayers' hard-earned dollars, not wantonly spend them in their own self-interest.

Unfortunately, Fletcher's bill cements her history of supporting increased spending and higher taxes. Rather than reducing government overreach or easing the tax burden on Houstonians, Fletcher seeks to raise taxes and require tax payers to foot the bill for her political campaigns.

This is an unfortunate reminder that in the face of massive government expansion and tax hikes envisioned by her far-left colleagues, Fletcher will not stand up for Houston's best interests. Instead, she will continue to support the reckless spending and government overreach outlined in Nancy Pelosi's agenda.

###

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e86281dc45994b368134d15254c91c2e&_e=LkMNxQ4WdtQ8V_Y7OxYo_aYU6jOSqZw7sPjFPmL4Cbt2xiPvwGgfPURlkpmSJxrwVoXfL8cMguIUnKXFNrvimdt4uzLaQWvNVW68JiPwCv6phVgyc5d-DY2xBCIM5Ta5YMcxbE3xqXFREYf0Qpm_AmJrqkU87c6tJ3ldR2Mysq00zlldgn6t9qK6WfIPMjtACyHm9TPc0z0f5Gl_4xvAmbjxWTVHlNk0RsJ8M8dOh2VZzGJ31riJktuvAJftMkXaaN617sZVJJ4HAAxu4i49_2QRiwLBsfSWriJJlYLfFu8%3D)****
---

| Dear Friend,

Hooray! Our yard sign order has finally arrived! We know how excited everyone is about getting a Pat Hackett for Congress yard sign. Thank you for your patience! For safety and convenience, we are running drive-thru pick-up hours starting tomorrow. This week, hours will be:
**Wednesday, 3-7pm
Friday, 3-7pm
Saturday, 2-6pm
Sunday, 2-6 pm**

at our South Bend Headquarters
**402 W. Washington**
We will be following proper social distancing guidelines. All you need to do is drive through our parking lot, and a team member, wearing a mask and gloves, will greet you and load your sign into your car. That’s it!

Yard signs are free, but [donations are appreciated](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=38763ae34e&e=5886ca081d) to help us spread Pat’s message of Dignity and Justice for All during these last few weeks.

subject: We’re not leaving Florida
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTPiRwfKg2XHf0zL4uVny06Lc7yKQsB2mZ7N4oGQtr1qFxkMYVU6sHoHkR3DW7mQ9or8yRPgAOjsua_Exms42v-RrjxXiXPscSrznLNSL7EtTvirDLBhr0Q9P3ixgrOrWjc0s-O2HB53PVoxwE7lfnRg/35l/o6UKVMXmTQGI6up70bQtkg/h0/p7XurR2MzHtG9ViKYdQZdmkCXWCHCJ6_mM5x6jaofwE) We hit hard in Florida last week, Team. Before Trump had taken the stage to spread his usual rhetoric in Jacksonville, we’d given our own presentation to moderate voters in and around the city.

Much as many of them lent the President their attention, many lent their digital activity to us. We found a story that spoke to the undeniable true nature of the pandemic, brought it to the feeds of Jacksonville’s swing voters, and saw Click-Through-Rates as high as 14.49% (the average across all industries sits at a mere 0.90%)
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkbEIE_Fuxmv450oEF-K7cFzXbTbuaU3Y1vUdIZ9ZY4itJ7kmLRnmrL8bSZVPM_1566ezZu0PTvL0oHdHqe1-SUpnDVWC4vMp5XzXPCMwIbwOim0qlOXoCEu_jlCu7Vxp0o4BHCWEg73gnEMS7VeU9eCYCbd3pDWRszUMXIgDohVLHPeMA9Z1zsaWz7A_xe-CJtQPtJJx0bCQRznC2Z1SVMtlWywU_yA09A4oSVmntxKkC4tgCKtdfiA5o-4pyZX7RXQ6uw0juVRLFuuV9itIqKDfbtLQ-8cNFhVhQQSrWYPQ3on2k6mgdwXh9mO4UwqPIg/35l/o6UKVMXmTQGI6up70bQtkg/h1/OawSDLXAhtMkjcQ3nzoG2FMxEP_XBFwI1FcdL-oi0Yw) Because of this success, we won’t be following Trump to Minnesota for his next stump speech, but doubling down on our efforts in the Sunshine State, readying for his return to Florida this Friday.

By then, we’ll have moved the needle on Trump’s weakest issue, and done so among voters that understand reality when they’re faced with it.

**When you make a contribution today, you double down on those efforts: you touch swing voters in Florida with the truth about COVID-19.**

**Through your support** , we will win over undecideds before Trump takes the stage this Friday.

clean_body: | | | We hit hard in Florida last week, Team. Before Trump had taken the stage to spread his usual rhetoric in Jacksonville, we’d given our own presentation to moderate voters in and around the city. Much as many of them lent the President their attention, many lent their digital activity to us. We found a story that spoke to the undeniable true nature of the pandemic, brought it to the feeds of Jacksonville’s swing voters, and saw Click-Through-Rates as high as 14.49% (the average across all industries sits at a mere 0.90%) Because of this success, we won’t be following Trump to Minnesota for his next stump speech, but doubling down on our efforts in the Sunshine State, readying for his return to Florida this Friday. By then, we’ll have moved the needle on Trump’s weakest issue, and done so among voters that understand reality when they’re faced with it. When you make a contribution today, you double down on those efforts: you touch swing voters in Florida with the truth about COVID-19. Through your support , we will win over undecideds before Trump takes the stage this Friday. **** Thank you for being part of the fight. The Defeat Disinfo Team If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies. | | Sent via . name: [PENCE FLIGHT CONFIRMATION ALERT] via Ossoff HQ
subject: Pence is coming to Georgia TOMORROW!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Soon, we'll have the entire cabinet here. |
---
They just can't stay away, friend.

First, it was Eric Trump. Then Don Jr. Then Ivanka, Bill Barr, and Donald Trump himself. **And now, Vice President Mike Pence is coming to Georgia TOMORROW!**
[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ece/5b2c1286/3b9c69d8/25f2547e/2491701463/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_29_pence_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_29_pence_visit_img")
| | [DONATE NOW >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ece/5b2c1286/3b9c69d8/25f25381/2491701463/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_29_pence_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_29_pence_visit")
---

We've had plenty of GOP visitors to Georgia lately, so we know all too well what this means. Republican leaders know that Georgia is THE battleground state -- and they're right.

In 2014, the GOP held an 8% lead in Georgia. In 2016, it was just 5%. Then, in 2018, Democrats narrowed that margin to a mere 1.4%. _Anyone who knows anything about Georgia knows -- we're expecting to see the trend continue._

**That's why they're all coming to Georgia, friend! The GOP is desperately trying to salvage their floundering support here, and trying to stop the momentum of Joe Biden and Jon Ossoff._And they'll stop at nothing to do so._**

Let's make sure the Trump Administration's efforts are all for nought.

**[Right now, Jon Ossoff is surging in the country's most competitive Senate race. Chip in any amount before Mike Pence lands TOMORROW to carry this Democratic momentum forward and keep the GOP on defense.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ece/5b2c1286/3b9c69d8/25f25381/2491701463/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_29_pence_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_29_pence_visit")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Oks?=
subject: The Gravel Institute is launching!
body:
Today, the Gravel Institute is officially launching to fight right-wing groups like PragerU on their own turf. | | | |
---
| | |
# A challenger approaches...
Hey ,

The long wait is over. **The Gravel Institute has launched**.

Our goal is simple: _fighting PragerU on its own turf_. Short, high-quality, easy-to-understand videos presenting leftist ideas and refuting right-wing lies: stuff that you can send to your parents, your friends, your worst enemies. Take a look at our launch video (there’s a surprise!):
---
| [ ](https://gravelinstitute.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=71f717db0e&e=85f7472d66)
---
We worked real hard on this one.
| We have an incredible lineup: Bernie Sanders. Mike Gravel. Chelsea Manning. Cornel West. Slavoj Zizek. Richard Wolff. Stephanie Kelton. And for our [first video, the incredible Briahna Joy Gray](https://gravelinstitute.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=9c1ed3cae0&e=85f7472d66).

Our goal is to build a collaborative organization, guided by its members: we want you in charge! Coming up with video topics, suggesting speakers, and building the infrastructure to win. So join us on YouTube:
---
| [Check out our channel](https://gravelinstitute.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=32c53361cc&e=85f7472d66 "Check out our channel")
---
| And we need your help in building the organization! We want to be funded solely by our supporters. Prager takes millions in oil money; we don't. So join us on Patreon if you can:
---
| [Become a patron!](https://gravelinstitute.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=c89924687a&e=85f7472d66 "Become a patron!")
---
| I want to sincerely thank all of you for the support you've given us as we build this project. And as always, feel free to write me if you have any questions at all. I'll respond!
---
| In Solidarity,
David Oks
**The Gravel Institute**
---

name: Rita Hart (personal)
subject: big deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | I can't believe that the campaign we started over a year ago is now coming to an end in just 35 days. These next few weeks are going to be the hardest yet on the campaign. The tenor of the race has already become negative, and we can expect more of that coming from the D.C. groups backing my opponent. **[We can also expect a lot of opportunities to reach voters and hear their stories. Can you make sure I can spend October meeting and listening to voters by donating whatever you can before my deadline tomorrow at midnight?](https://act.myngp.com/el/QFpFHF5BC3HOhLvRZ-jte_9nJpEB1Fcsiiwr31S36tU=/4qO8opbmezDDAFyxmTBfQjNP-26kX2zkdOTb5ZoaQ1w=?refcode=200929-email-pm)** I'm glad that I'll have you by my side over the next 35 days. We have to commit ourselves to working even harder if we're going to win a race that has been considered a complete toss-up for months. **[So, if you can, please donate today before our goal so we have the resources we need.](https://act.myngp.com/el/QFpFHF5BC3HOhLvRZ-jte_9nJpEB1Fcsiiwr31S36tU=/4qO8opbmezDDAFyxmTBfQjNP-26kX2zkdOTb5ZoaQ1w=?refcode=200929-email-pm)** Thanks so much, Rita Hart [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QFpFHF5BC3HOhLvRZ-jte_9nJpEB1Fcsiiwr31S36tU=/4qO8opbmezDDAFyxmTBfQjNP-26kX2zkdOTb5ZoaQ1w=?refcode=200929-email-pm) | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa

| Hi , Abby Broyles in the Senate would result in massive new taxes, weakened oil and gas, a liberal Supreme Court and another vote to support Joe Biden’s increasingly socialist agenda. **Oklahomans do not support any part of that radical agenda.** That is why our campaign thought it appropriate to ask the question: where should Abby Broyles run for the Senate? [**Help us get this ad seen by millions of Oklahomans before the election with a quick $25 donation to our campaign right now.**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTIxMDg3MDM1NTI2MzU0NTYyJmM9ZjFyNyZlPTE5MjgmYj00MTk2NTQxMjAmZD1tN2QxazR2.Fe43RpvQSKfoyavaJ8ZZrmXEdsjHKBRy8wltXf8lt5E)

| It is clear from socialist Senator Elizabeth Warren's endorsement of her campaign, to her career as a liberal media journalist, that Abby Broyles' politics are too far left for Oklahoma families. Broyles is opposed to a thriving oil and gas industry and favors policies more akin to the Green New Deal. If she had her way, tens of thousands of jobs would be destroyed in Oklahoma. She even opposes the immediate confirmation of Judge Amy Coney Barrett, President Trump’s replacement for Ruth Bader Ginsberg. She’d rather the Supreme Court be packed with liberal judges than with President Trump’s excellent choice. Those are the policies of a California liberal, not an Oklahoman. [**I hope I can count on your financial support to get this ad viewed on social media. Your generous contribution of $40, $70, $110 is crucial to our campaign's success this year.**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTIxMDg3MDM1NTI2MzU0NTYyJmM9ZjFyNyZlPTE5MjgmYj00MTk2NTQxMjYmZD12MnkydDdy.iHMJqsQ88OK0FHpk7WxwPT3hHjAT-9Sz4TpmTyimj5Y) Join our campaign today, and we will defeat this left-coast liberal come November 3rd.
