name: Francys Johnson, Former President of the Georgia NAACP
subject: The truth about what Trump thinks of Black America.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19720209/254194632/-726301913?=true&refcode=em-09292020-PM-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5MDkxYzFkLWE2MDItZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J40n9zyycuHx_MVv-fZtcx8AbOT5y65s90WomvavBcI=) Friend, This has been a week of revelations about Donald Trump. _**Among them—a disturbing report revealing one of the most sinister and sophisticated attempts to suppress Black votes since Jim Crow.**_ Let’s be transparent on how voter outreach on traditional campaigns normally works. On a typical campaign, voters, regardless of party affiliation, are ranked from 1 to 5 in likelihood of voting for the candidate. A campaign’s mission is simple: convert voters who are 3’s into 4’s, and 4’s into 5’s, and then make sure the 5’s vote on election day. But now, thanks to a huge leak of Trump campaign data, we know that Trump and his lackeys used an alarming tactic to win in 2016. **They identified 3.5 million Black Americans in their voter database, but instead of finding ways to convince Black America to vote for Donald Trump, they labeled them and other minority groups with “Deterrence,” then they spent Trump’s campaign resources making sure those voters had the most miserable voting experience possible. These Draconian tactics hark back to America’s darkest days, and are the same strategies used by fascist governments and oppressive regimes across the globe.** _Friend_ _, how many African American voters have already been labeled as "deterrence" in 2020?_ We have to fight back. _**Make no mistake, election night 2020 is not on November 3rd, it is happening right now.**_ We have to secure our votes by voting as early as possible and creating a plan for our families regarding how we are going to vote in October and November. _[**I also want to encourage you to donate whatever you can to the Georgia Blue Project today, and help us pay for digital and television ads that will work to help those same Democrats win their elections in November and send a message to Donald Trump and his Republican enablers: Nothing can keep Georgia voters from doing their civil duty and kicking Trump to the curb.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19720210/254194633/-363837216?=true&refcode=em-09292020-PM-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5MDkxYzFkLWE2MDItZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J40n9zyycuHx_MVv-fZtcx8AbOT5y65s90WomvavBcI=)_ It will take every single one of us to defeat Donald Trump, and to put Georgia into the hands of leaders who believe in working for the people, not for their demagogue. —Francys Johnson [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19720211/254194634/-726301913?&amount=&refcode=em-09292020-PM-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5MDkxYzFkLWE2MDItZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J40n9zyycuHx_MVv-fZtcx8AbOT5y65s90WomvavBcI=) | |

clean_body: = Friend, This has been a week of revelations about Donald Trump. Among them—a disturbing report revealing one of the most sinister and sophisticated attempts to suppress Black votes since Jim Crow. Let’s be transparent on how voter outreach on traditional campaigns normally works. On a typical campaign, voters, regardless of party affiliation, are ranked from 1 to 5 in likelihood of voting for the candidate. A campaign’s mission is simple: convert voters who are 3’s into 4’s, and 4’s into 5’s, and then make sure the 5’s vote on election day. But now, thanks to a huge leak of Trump campaign data, we know that Trump and his lackeys used an alarming tactic to win in 2016. They identified 3.5 million Black Americans in their voter database, but instead of finding ways to convince Black America to vote for Donald Trump, they labeled them and other minority groups with “Deterrence,” then they spent Trump’s campaign resources making sure those voters had the most miserable voting experience possible. These Draconian tactics hark back to America’s darkest days, and are the same strategies used by fascist governments and oppressive regimes across the globe. Friend , how many African American voters have already been labeled as "deterrence" in 2020? We have to fight back. Make no mistake, election night 2020 is not on November 3rd, it is happening right now. We have to secure our votes by voting as early as possible and creating a plan for our families regarding how we are going to vote in October and November. = It will take every single one of us to defeat Donald Trump, and to put Georgia into the hands of leaders who believe in working for the people, not for their demagogue. —Francys Johnson = | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by GBP, www.georgiablueproject.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Tom Cotton
subject: Peter, President Trump asked me to contact you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
President Trump reached out to me and he's asking for our support after the first presidential debate tonight in Cleveland. President Trump needs me to activate my TOP SUPPORTERS to stand with him as he goes toe-to-toe with Joe Biden. We need to defend President Trump and push back against the ugly Democrat smears in the media that we know are coming.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NzMyNDYS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjQ0ODQ3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

**President Trump reached out to me and he 's asking for our support after the first presidential debate tonight in Cleveland. **

President Trump needs me to activate my **TOP SUPPORTERS** to stand with him as he goes toe-to-toe with Joe Biden.

We need to defend President Trump and push back against the ugly Democrat smears in the media that we know are coming.

[**We have set a goal to activate 450 patriots to donate between now and 11:59 PM to support President Trump.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NzMyNDYS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjQ0ODQ3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

This is your chance to support the Trump agenda and ensure Republicans have FOUR MORE YEARS to Keep America Great.

I'm already running ads attacking Joe Biden. Now, we have to act quickly once the debate is over or Democrats will set the narrative and smear President Trump, which is why we need 450 patriots to step up before midnight.

_President Trump is going to ask if we were able to hit our goal. _

body:
Tomorrow marks our FINAL end-of-quarter fundraising DEADLINE. Will you chip in?
Friend,

I know you’ve been getting a lot of emails recently, but I wouldn’t write if it wasn’t important.
Tomorrow marks our FINAL end-of-quarter fundraising DEADLINE before the election in November, and it’s incredibly important every single conservative in Texas’ 22nd district chips in whatever they can.
The DCCC is targeting Texas as one of its top battleground states, and Nancy Pelosi is funneling MILLIONS of dollars into our district helping my extremist opponent Sri Kulkarni spread lies about me and my 28 years of law enforcement service.
My opponent, Sri Kulkarni, has taken money from radical-left groups that are bent on defunding the police _and we know if he's elected, he will be nothing but a rubberstamp vote for Nancy Pelosi and her radical leftist agenda!_
Our country needs law and order now more than ever. It's up to us to ensure this seat stays RED, and out of Nancy Pelosi's hands.
_**[Will you please do me a favor and chip in what you can right now to defeat the socialists in Congress?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/1b3eb78662d15376/b64751c42ea097bdc3d6b838967d376c/35193)**_ [Rush an urgent End-of-Quarter Contribution!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/1b3eb78662d15376/e339fad60aec224ec3d6b838967d376c/35193) Friend, I need your help to hit my campaign's End-of-Quarter goal.
If we fall short, we may ultimately fall short on Election Day.
Please, consider responding right now by rushing a contribution at our secure link. _**[Just click or tap here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/1b3eb78662d15376/e17ef32e26fe7561c3d6b838967d376c/35193)**_.

name: Rob Portman
subject: HUGE deadline approaching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
It is shocking to me that we have already made it to the end of September -- meaning that not only have we reached the end of the third quarter, but t Peter, It is shocking to me that we have already made it to the end of September -- meaning that not only have we reached the end of the third quarter, but the election is nearly ONE MONTH away. Things are really heating up. We are in the final stretch, Peter. That’s why I set a MASSIVE goal for ourselves to end September... I want to make sure that we promote conservative values here in Ohio, but I also want to invest in close races all around the country to make sure that we don’t LOSE the Senate. Now, as we kick off our End of Month Fund, I’m looking to YOU to help make sure we can accomplish our goal, and defend Ohio AND keep our U.S. Senate majority. Friend -- Did you get a chance to read Stacey Abrams' email yesterday about the importance of supporting Jon Ossoff?

Democratic momentum has been building in Georgia for years.

In 2018, Stacey came within 55,000 votes of becoming Georgia's Governor. **_Since then, more than 750,000 new voters are registered and eligible to vote here.

And more than 337,000 Georgians who didn't vote in 2016 have requested ballots already._**

Change is going to come to Georgia in 2020 with the election of Jon Ossoff to the United States Senate -- **but we need to hit Wednesday's critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal for Jon to stay on track to win.**

**[So friend, Stacey Abrams is asking: Can you chip in to elect Jon Ossoff?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ec2/5b2c1286/3b8413ee/25f25225/242062270/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_28_stacey_eoq?refcode=em_2020_09_29_stacey_eoq_k")**

Team Ossoff

**From:** Stacey Abrams
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** September 28, 2020
**Subject:** I'm voting for Jon Ossoff

**Friend, Election Day is 36 days away, and the stakes couldn't be higher.**
Republican leaders have turned their backs on Americans all over the country -- in the middle of a global pandemic, in the face of widespread racism, and on the brink of an economic catastrophe.

**There is no path to save our democracy this year that doesn't involve taking back the U.S. Senate --_and right now U.S Senate candidate Jon Ossoff is narrowly leading GOP Senator David Perdue in several polls._**

**[That's why I'm asking, friend: Can you rush $20 RIGHT NOW to elect my friend, Jon Ossoff, to the United States Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ec2/5b2c1286/3b8413ee/25f2522a/242062270/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_28_stacey_eoq?refcode=em_2020_09_29_stacey_eoq_k&amount=20")**

Then, in this year's June primary election, **Georgia Democrats SHATTERED voter turnout records** in nominating him. Not to mention, **_Georgia Democrats actually outnumbered Georgia Republicans in June!_**

Jon's movement is building more and more momentum each day, friend.

Derek, this final stretch of the election is the most critical yet, and I’m spending these last weeks working to ensure victory for all Democrats on Election Day -- not just my campaign at the top of the ticket. Of course, my biggest concern is beating Donald Trump. But we won't be able to enact the bold, transformative change our country urgently needs unless Democrats can win at every level and in _every single state_. And we can’t achieve this change without folks like you, Derek. This election has always been about so much more than just one person, one candidate, or one office. It's about restoring the soul of our nation, Derek, and that is a feat that will take all of us rising together. Democrats in tight races everywhere need your support. So, I must ask personally for your help: **Will you split a $7 donation between my campaign and the DNC today? With just weeks left before voting ends, time is running out to make investments that will have a big impact from the top of the ticket to the bottom.**

I’m proud of the progress we’ve made despite the challenges we’ve faced over the past four years. Together, with this grassroots team, our party has overhauled its tech and data infrastructure, hired and trained organizers in key battleground states, and installed voter protection directors in the states most vulnerable to Republican voter suppression tactics. Because of this work, we have a real, fighting chance at winning -- and I’m not just talking about my own campaign. Democrats nationwide have the power to turn the page on Trump's ugly brand of politics -- but not without each person on this team chipping in what they can and getting involved. I’m asking you today to invest _now_ , while we can still make an impact on the outcome of this election. **[While there’s time left to move the needle in this race, will you make a $7 investment in my campaign and the DNC? clean_body: Democrats in tight races everywhere need your support. So, I must ask personally for your help: | | Derek, this final stretch of the election is the most critical yet, and I’m spending these last weeks working to ensure victory for all Democrats on Election Day -- not just my campaign at the top of the ticket. Of course, my biggest concern is beating Donald Trump. But we won't be able to enact the bold, transformative change our country urgently needs unless Democrats can win at every level and in every single state. And we can’t achieve this change without folks like you, Derek. This election has always been about so much more than just one person, one candidate, or one office. It's about restoring the soul of our nation, Derek, and that is a feat that will take all of us rising together. Democrats in tight races everywhere need your support. So, I must ask personally for your help: Will you split a $7 donation between my campaign and the DNC today? With just weeks left before voting ends, time is running out to make investments that will have a big impact from the top of the ticket to the bottom. **** I’m proud of the progress we’ve made despite the challenges we’ve faced over the past four years. Together, with this grassroots team, our party has overhauled its tech and data infrastructure, hired and trained organizers in key battleground states, and installed voter protection directors in the states most vulnerable to Republican voter suppression tactics. Because of this work, we have a real, fighting chance at winning -- and I’m not just talking about my own campaign. Democrats nationwide have the power to turn the page on Trump's ugly brand of politics -- but not without each person on this team chipping in what they can and getting involved. I’m asking you today to invest now , while we can still make an impact on the outcome of this election. Thanks again, Joe Joe Biden P.S. Democrats are playing to win everywhere , and that requires more resources -- especially as campaigns navigate uncharted territory due to this crisis.

Hey friend - we’re reaching out today because we have an urgent request.

_Our final End of Quarter fundraising deadline before Election Day is this Wednesday (September 30th) at midnight. _

This is one of the last big fundraising opportunities we have left before Election Day, and we’re reaching out to every member of our grassroots community and asking them to help us capitalize on this opportunity.

We’ve made a lot of progress over the last four years, but here’s the truth — there’s still a lot of work to be done to build One Indiana for All.

If we want to keep building on the best infrastructure in the country, getting our economy back on track, helping Hoosiers skill-up for high-wage careers, and much, much more, we need to go all in until Election Day.

**That’s why we’re asking every single one of our supporters to chip in before our End of Quarter deadline hits. **

Friend, can we count on you to come through for us and help push our campaign over the line on Election Day? Donate before our deadline ends below.

Friend,

Are you watching the Presidential Debate between my father and Joe Biden?

He is currently fighting to put America First for FOUR MORE YEARS, and I know how much your support would mean to him right now.

I am getting ready to print the FINAL Presidential Debate Donor List that he’ll see when he gets back to his office tonight. You’ve always been one of his strongest supporters, so I want to give YOU the opportunity to get your name at the TOP of the list.
If you step up IMMEDIATELY, I’ll make sure he sees YOUR NAME FIRST and your gift will be 800%-MATCHED!
Remember, the President of the United States wants a printed donor list of all Patriots who donate during the debate. Can I add your name?

name: Sri
subject: final deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

I know it’s scary to stress the urgency of the moment we face, but simply put, we have to.

Our country is facing dire economic straits with health care, Medicare, and social security still under constant threat.

This election is our last chance for the foreseeable future to get our nation back on track. For each other, and for our country -- we need you to fight alongside us.

Please take a moment to read the note I sent you earlier today. Then, if you’re able, do what you can to help steer our country in a more hopeful direction.

Here’s my ActBlue page, where you can make a donation towards tomorrow night's FEC deadline. This is our last major deadline before the election so we have to have the strongest possible showing: secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.29_b2_sm2_all&amount=25

Thanks,

Sri

-------Forwarded Message-------
Date: September 29, 2020
Sender: Sri Preston Kulkarni
Subject: Last chance

Dear friends and supporters,

This is it. I don’t mean this is it, as in the final financial deadline for the campaign on September 30. I mean this is it for our country, for our children’s education, our economy, our health, our rule of law, and our right to even have a democracy.

I wish I was being dramatic, but we know the costs of having elected leaders who don’t believe in or follow science: 200,000 dead, 50 million unemployed, 1 out of 6 small businesses have gone under, millions of children not able to get a proper education. And we all know that it didn’t need to be this bad.

If you care about all of these things -- if you want to bring back reason and science, if you want to see our elected officials using power to show compassion, not cruelty, and if you want to push back against the division and hate spreading across this country with inclusion and decency -- we need you now.

In person voting starts October 13th, and people are already voting by mail. There is no later.

But we also need your financial support. I wouldn’t be asking if we didn’t need it, but we do. The last deadline of the campaign is Wednesday at midnight.

We need your help and we need it now. Please give generously, because none of us want to be thinking on November 4th, “I wish I had done more.” Let’s all be saying, “Thank God we did enough.”

This is the big one.

Click here to help: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.29_b2_sm2_all&amount=25

Thank you all,
Sri

Can you make it weekly?

Friend -- we’re just 5 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.

Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way!

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.29_b2_sm2_all&amount=5&recurring=1

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.29_b2_sm2_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/5009ab78-7402-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc/911cc62d-b602-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTFjYzYyZC1iNjAyLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqRNUjJ8iTfbRYB3FeBIo4Bzo0DuIHXXoOrORYsf1qs=&id=117373579 .

body:
It has never been clearer why we need to get Trump out of the White House. |
#
Peter --

It has never been clearer that we need to get Trump out of the White House. His debate remarks warrant no commentary or analysis. He is a divisive president whose comments and policies have only made us feel increasingly divided and separated. We CANNOT allow another four years of his presidency. Unfortunately, polls are closer in key battleground states than we would like to see. We only have 6 days left to register voters in critical states like AZ, FL, and TX.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump announces massive Coronavirus testing expansion
body:
America has already conducted far more Coronavirus tests than any other nation on Earth. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=48857057ff&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 29, 2020
---
| | |
# President Trump announces massive Coronavirus testing expansion

**America has already** conducted far more Coronavirus tests than any other nation on Earth—more than the entire European Union and more than all of Latin America combined.

**Now, President Trump** has announced that his Administration will distribute 150 million rapid, point-of-care Coronavirus tests in the coming weeks. This action will more than double the total number of tests already performed in the United States.

**🎬**[**WATCH: President Trump announces massive testing expansion**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=141ed40c04&e=3ee4985eea)

“**Fifty million tests** will go to protect the most vulnerable communities, which we’ve always promised to do, including 18 million for nursing homes; 15 million for assisted living facilities; 10 million for home, health, and . . . hospice care agencies; and nearly 1 million for historically black colleges and universities,” the President said.

**Another 100 million** rapid tests will be given to states and territories to support efforts to reopen their economies and schools as quickly and safely as possible.

**“We are now **at an inflection point in testing,” President Trump said. The United States now has the capacity to run, on average, 3 million tests per day. That number doesn’t include “pooled testing,” which could multiply that figure several times.

**Vice President Pence** said he believes an announcement about a Coronavirus vaccine will come soon after yesterday’s historic milestone.

**“It’s a testament** to great companies like Abbott Laboratories and the thousands of employees who, Mr. President, I know have literally worked around the clock since those early days in this pandemic, when you brought in the greatest research companies in America,” the Vice President added.

**🎬**[**Mississippi Governor: “This is a game-changer.”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6bca63b567&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬** [**WATCH: President Trump’s full Rose Garden announcement**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=55040ab94f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Trump Administration leads effort to correct headstone of first woman ever to vote in America**
**Today, National Security Advisor** Robert O’Brien accompanied White House staff and a delegation from Utah to pay respects at the gravesite of Seraph Young Ford.

**On February 14, 1870,** after the Utah Territory extended voting rights to women, Ford became the first female to cast a ballot in an American election.

**Ford was buried** at Arlington National Cemetery, and for years, the name on her headstone remained spelled incorrectly. Working with Arlington National Cemetery officials, the Trump Administration corrected her headstone this year—coinciding with the 100th anniversary of the Nineteenth Amendment, which guaranteed women’s suffrage.

**“The determination and spirit** of the leaders of the women’s suffrage movement continues to inspire the fight for greater rights for all,” O’Brien’s statement reads.

[**Read the full statement from National Security Advisor O’Brien.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=92fbf19f33&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump and Vice President Mike Pence give remarks during an update on the nation’s Coronavirus testing strategy** | September 28, 2020
---
|

body:
| |

| | |
---
| Peter,

I want to make sure you saw Genevieve's email from earlier today. I'm running the numbers and I just had to tell her that we're still coming up short. [**We need an additional $7,146 to meet our end of quarter goal**.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=34c5c33175&e=68aaeb0998)

This is our last quarterly report of the campaign, and we need to enter the home stretch with enough cash on hand to ensure that Genevieve's message is heard loud and clear all the way to Election Day. [I know that Genevieve can count on you to give what you can before the clock strikes midnight tomorrow.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=6971f5d25b&e=68aaeb0998)

Thank you!

Rob Costello
Campaign Manager

Begin forwarded message:

From: Genevieve Collins <info@gcforcongress.com>
Date: Tue, Sep 29, 2020 at 12:00 PM
Subject: Urgent: 36 hours left
To: Rob Costello <info@gcforcongress.com>
---
|
---
|
---
| Rob,
**In 36 hours, we will reach our final and most critical quarterly fundraising deadline of the campaign.**
Colin Allred, backed by Nancy Pelosi and far-left interests, has built a large war chest to use against me. [Help me match them dollar for dollar!](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=0d56e3aa57&e=68aaeb0998)

---
| Early Voting is right around the corner, and [the money we raise to close out Q3](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=fd4783b2cd&e=68aaeb0998) will immediately help us reach more voters and turn out our supporters at the polls.

[So please help my campaign with a contribution of $100, $500, $1,000, or whatever you can afford to chip in.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=50e57a6eb0&e=68aaeb0998)
---
| There are less than 40 days to go until Election Day, and with your help, I know we're going to win and take this seat back!

Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32

Hoosier Republican,

There’s less than 48 hours left until the final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before the election, and your donation now can be the difference-maker.

Across the state, we’re supporting our Indiana Republican Ticket – and they are in some big battles for the general election. Whether it’s supporting Governor Holcomb and his re-election campaign, or Victoria Spartz fighting to keep the 5th District red, everyone has the pedal to the metal.

These candidates need your help now more than ever!

Will you chip in to help our Indiana Republican ticket win big and keep Indiana RED?

Rush $5 to support Hoosier Republicans! (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eoq-1-092920?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_e_eoq_1_092920&amount=5&mc_cid=3d3bd1bd65&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

So we can't stop now. We need to keep raising money so we can carry this momentum all the way through until November. "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for being part of this unstoppable momentum. More soon, Team Ossoff | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

| | | Friend - October 6 is right around the corner! Can you join my friends Hillary Clinton and Audra McDonald and me for a conversation about the state of our democracy in support of Fair Fight PAC and Hillary's advocacy organization, Onward Together? [RSVP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4bd/34a064cc/1a3cc753/702d252/1543512047/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hillaryandstacey?refcode=e10062020a2") The fight leading up to November is one we all are a part of -- and we still have work to do. There is so much at stake. We need your voice. We need your support. With it, we can help ensure every eligible vote is counted in the upcoming election and move one step closer to a more free and fair America. name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: Presidential Debate Primer...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends-

Tonight is the first opportunity for Joe Biden to debate Donald Trump, and we are going to be seeing two different visions for America. Trump, who sees the world from a “greed is good” version of Park Avenue and Joe Biden, who sees the world from his hometown of Scranton, Pennsylvania.

We could not be more proud to work closely with the Biden Campaign to be a resource to you throughout the night. The Biden Campaign and the DNC War Room will have a rapid response team fact-checking the debate in real time.

Ahead of tonight’s debate in Cleveland, Biden for President and the DNC War Room have also [launched](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b7eb7e613a&e=d6c5c7d7ec) a joint fact-checking account on Twitter to go after Trump’s lies. [@Truth](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=444feab7a1&e=d6c5c7d7ec) will provide viewers with real-time information debunking Trump’s lies so voters are well-informed of the facts.

In addition, we are continuing to take the fight for people’s lives directly to Trump. There will be driving billboards around the debate hall in Cleveland, Ohio, indicating the over 200,000 deaths in this country from the coronavirus with audio of Trump saying “he wanted to always play it down.” Also, the billboards will acknowledge what’s at stake if the Supreme Court overturns the Affordable Care Act. After the debate, there will be a light display with the phrase “Trump lied, 200,000+ died.” There will be constant reminders of Trump’s failure to lead, before, during and after the debate. Here are some:

Friday was the[ highest single-day increase](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9fc799e726&e=d6c5c7d7ec) in COVID in a month-and-a-half. New cases continue to increase across the country, including in[ almost half of states](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=60924929ef&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and Trump still hasn’t put forth a national plan.

Trump’s nomination of Judge Amy Coney Barrett puts at risk the 20 million people who could lose their health insurance and as many as 133 million Americans with preexisting conditions who will lose coverage protections. Trump's also been clear that he would only appoint justices who would overturn Roe v Wade.

And while hard working Americans played by the rules and paid federal income taxes, Trump paid $0 for years and only $750 in 2016 and 2017. Donald Trump paid far less in taxes than the average teacher, firefighter, or nurse.

During the debate, Joe Biden is going to be focused on speaking directly to the American people. He's going to talk about his plan to contain COVID-19 and to build our country back better. And, he’s going to talk about his plan to ensure working families and small businesses have a fair shot and make the super-wealthy and corporations pay their fair share. It will be the night when he will look Donald Trump directly in the eyes and hold him to account for failing our country in the midst of this pandemic. 200,000 Americans have paid with their lives and over 26 million are receiving unemployment assistance.

We are not just in the middle of a presidential election cycle, but people are voting now. [Nearly one million people have already voted](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=be851117b1&e=d6c5c7d7ec). The American people are making their voices heard. And as Joe Biden said, the American people should choose the president, and the next president should fill the Supreme Court nominee.

Tonight, Joe Biden will remind the country of why we cannot have another four years of this chaos. He will speak to these issues and speak directly to Americans who are worried and scared for their future, and tired of all the fighting and looking for a leader to bring Americans together. We need a change in leadership, and Joe Biden is the one to meet this moment.

Yours in the Fight,
Mũthoni

P.S. We aren’t the only ones with Billboards holding Trump accountable in Cleveland.
Check [these](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b6f46ae5ec&e=d6c5c7d7ec) out in this Update:
* DNC Debate Fact Check Toolkit
* 5 Ways to Amplify Messaging
* FAQ’s for Watching Tonight’s Debate

DNC [Debate Fact Check Toolkit](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4a32b96276&e=d6c5c7d7ec) (also see attached PDF for those who can’t access Google docs)5 ways to Amplify the Messaging for Tonight:Here are ways that you can help share information about Trump’s failed record, promote Vice President Biden’s platform, and support high voter turnout in your communities. PLEASE SHARE WIDELY!!!
1. Social Media
* Follow the DNC War Room on [Facebook](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=edb5b1ee32&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and [Twitter](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8c57b5f59a&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and RT/QT us throughout the debate
* Follow Senator Kamala Harris [@KamalaHarris](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2e25491da2&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and RT/QT her as she uplifts Vice President Biden’s remarks during the debate
* Follow and RT/QT the new Biden Harris [@Truth](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9bee966f10&e=d6c5c7d7ec) Twitter account
* Check our [CREATIVE FACT CHECK ASSETS](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=648bfcdb86&e=d6c5c7d7ec) folder throughout the night and post our visuals on your social media platforms
* Write from your own perspective! For example, when Trump lies about the coronavirus or says that he’s done a great job, talk about how his mismanagement of Covid19 has impacted your community or your life, or post articles on his failure to lead
* Use our hashtags: #TrumpLied200KDied, #HealthCareVoter, #ScrantonvsParkAve
2. Message Your Constituents

After the debate, send an e-blast to your members and constituents with facts about Trump’s record on topics concerning your community. For example:

Subject: Correcting Trump’s Lies

This evening during the first presidential debate, Donald Trump said ______ about ______. This is false. This is the true record of the Trump administration:

[INSERT FACTS FROM BELOW]

We need a president with honesty and integrity, who is committed to help -not hurt- Americans. Vice President Biden proved that he has what it takes to lead us out of the mess Trump has made. Please make a plan to vote early. Visit iwillvote.com for information about how to safely vote in your state.

Note: iwillvote.com is the DNC voter resource. If you are a 501 c 3, you should promote a non political voter platform.
3. Write an Op-Ed

After the debate, keep the pressure on Trump by penning an op-ed in your local paper about Trump’s lies, his failed COVID-19 response, and why you support Vice President Biden. Include facts about Trump’s record and the Vice President’s plans (talking points on both are below.)

4. Promote Vice President Biden’s Record

In addition to fact-checking Trump’s lies, we want to elevate Vice President Biden’s record and his plan to lead America out of the darkness of the past 4 years. Reference the below messaging points on Joe Biden’s plan below.

5. Volunteer

Reaching out to voters is the most important thing we can do to get out the vote in key battleground states. Sign up at [joebiden.com/take-action](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=81ea918e2c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to text, call, support voter protection efforts, or find events near you.

FAQs on Watching the Debates:What time are the debates?
* It starts at 9 p.m. ET and will run 90 minutes without commercial interruption.

How can I watch the debates?
* The debates will be shown live on channels including ABC, CBS, Fox, NBC, CNN, Fox News, MSNBC and C-Span. You will also be able to stream the debate live on YouTube and various newspapers online.

Who is the moderator?
* Fox News anchor Chris Wallace is the first presidential debate moderator.

What is the format of the debates?
* “The nonpartisan Commission on Presidential Debates said in June that both the first and third presidential debates would be divided into six segments, each on topics to be selected by the moderator and announced at least one week before the debate.”

Chris Wallace selected tonight’s 6 topics:
* The Trump and Biden records
* The Supreme Court
* Covid-19
* The economy
* “Race and violence in cities” (**fully believe that this is [problematic framing ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=fedc27c346&e=d6c5c7d7ec)but these “topics” are chosen by the moderator)
* The integrity of the election

---

body:
Are you joining us for our watch party and discussion of The Glorias tomorrow night? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/32d8a2beee2a/shero?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hi!

Are you joining us for our watch party and discussion of The Glorias tomorrow night? We’ve got a stellar crew of powerful womxn tuning in and I’m going to hunker down with a glass of wine (just kidding! It’s whiskey).

I’m super excited about this event and I hope you’ll join me. There is a lot going on right now and things feel chaotic for so many of us — this is an opportunity to reflect and to sit in solidarity with the people who’ve paved the way for womxn like me to run for (and serve in!) public office.

[Please join us.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=3b33bcf74e&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani

subject: McConnell S-C-R-E-W-E-D!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | [**HELLOOOO DEMOCRATS!**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b203/18e32a7f/4aca6e53/7b20acb2/1289261603/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200929_em_fr_b1_carville_90_rs&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") I asked ya. Joe Biden asked ya. Kamala Harris asked ya. Nancy Pelosi asked ya. Pete Buttigieg asked ya. Kirsten Gillibrand asked ya. Jaime Harrison asked ya. Paul Begala asked ya. Michelle Lujan Grisham asked ya. Now I'm asking ya -- AGAIN! [_**Because we're in the fight of our lives to WIN this Senate race and OUST McConnell 's majority. Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b203/18e32a7f/4aca6e53/7b20acaa/1289261603/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b203/18e32a7f/4aca6e53/7b20acab/1289261603/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b203/18e32a7f/4aca6e53/7b20aca8/1289261603/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b203/18e32a7f/4aca6e53/7b20acb4/1289261603/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b203/18e32a7f/4aca6e53/7b20acb6/1289261603/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b203/18e32a7f/4aca6e53/7b20aca9/1289261603/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Donald Trump's tax returns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Well, no wonder Donald Trump fought so hard to keep his tax returns a secret. They paint an ugly picture of a crooked businessman. A cheater whose rickety finances are held together by scotch tape and | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251c4/45c30650/1c152002a/66e892ee/3303345509/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Well, no wonder Donald Trump fought so hard to keep his tax returns a secret.

They paint an ugly picture of a crooked businessman. A cheater whose rickety finances are held together by scotch tape and corruption. A president who is a walking, talking conflict of interest. A self-proclaimed billionaire **who paid just $750 in federal income taxes in 2016 and 2017.

He knows better than anyone that there's one set of rules for the wealthy and giant corporations and another for hardworking Americans** -- and instead of using his power to fix it, he's taken advantage of it at every turn.

But his time is just about up. This November, we are going to defeat him, elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and put Democrats into power across the country.

**[Help elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot who will make our country work for everyone-- not just rich and powerful cheaters. If you're able to, please make a donation of $2 or whatever you can today. It will go a long way before Wednesday's big FEC deadline.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251c4/45c30650/1c152002a/66e892d1/3303345509/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjIzRl9FT1FfQ09SX0VfMjAyMDA5MjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV23F_EOQ_COR_E_20200928_V1S1_P")**

Let's show Donald Trump and his Republican enablers that we are building the movement that will take power out of their hands.

Because this is about more than one man's personal tax scams.

Donald Trump has also taken advantage of a corrupt system that's built for people like him to do what he did.

A system that kicks dirt in the faces of teachers, nurses, janitors, farmworkers -- people who do more in a day to build up our country than Donald Trump has in a lifetime. People who work hard and pay it forward so the next kid can have a shot, too.

But this system doesn't exist because of some inevitable, natural force, like gravity. It only exists because billionaires and giant corporations have been able to write the rules in Washington. And that's not a given. As long as we win big this November, we'll have the chance to rewrite those rules -- and make them work for everyone.

But to win up and down the ballot, we need to throw ourselves into the fight and expand our grassroots organizing.

And that takes real resources.

**Warren Democrats in powerfully important races across the country are counting on grassroots donors to power them to victory.**

**[If you can, please pitch in right now to help fund the organizing that will make sure we win big in 2020 and start making real, systemic change in 2021 and beyond.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251c4/45c30650/1c152002a/66e892d1/3303345509/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjIzRl9FT1FfQ09SX0VfMjAyMDA5MjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV23F_EOQ_COR_E_20200928_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251c4/45c30650/1c152002a/66e892d1/3303345509/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjIzRl9FT1FfQ09SX0VfMjAyMDA5MjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV23F_EOQ_COR_E_20200928_V1S1_P")

name: Team Warner
subject: "leadership"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mark Warner's opponent is praising Trump's "great leadership" during the pandemic.
|
---

| | **" The president's leadership on [the pandemic]
has been great."**
_-- Daniel Gade, Mark Warner's opponent_
| [Donate to keep Mark Warner in the Senate](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da9b/53d9897e/5581c2da/1c881f44/260621386/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-great?refcode=20200929_f_1_nd__809__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")
---
Derek --

Donald Trump knew about the severity and deadliness of COVID-19 and kept this critical information from the American people.

Over 200,000 Americans have died on President Trump's watch, but instead of focusing on the public health crisis at hand, he's focused on his re-election efforts and downplayed the grave danger of coronavirus. **What 's worse: Mark Warner's opponent is praising Trump's "great leadership" during the pandemic.**

That's not the kind of leadership that we need in Virginia -- keeping critical health information from the American public shouldn't be worthy of praise. It doesn't matter what political party you're part of. That's why we need to re-elect Mark Warner, who has been leading the way on bipartisan coronavirus relief.

**[Can you chip in to make sure Mark stays in the Senate, working hard for every Virginian?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da9b/53d9897e/5581c2da/1c881f43/260621386/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-great?refcode=20200929_f_1_nd__809__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Mark is committed to helping Americans who are struggling through this unprecedented crisis by working to expand unemployment benefits and ensure that every American has access to affordable health care. He's taking the pandemic seriously.

**_Mark 's opponent doesn't see things the same way._** Instead of recognizing coronavirus as the serious public health threat it is, he's held indoor events where masks were not required and even **compared wearing a mask to "tyranny."**

This election is about the kind of Commonwealth -- and country -- we want to be. **If you believe that Mark Warner 's steady leadership is the right choice for Virginia, please consider chipping in to support his re-election campaign today.**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da9b/53d9897e/5581c2da/1c881f42/260621386/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-great?refcode=20200929_f_1_nd__809__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da9b/53d9897e/5581c2da/1c881f41/260621386/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

subject: Trump vs. Biden
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

In one hour we will finally get to see President Trump face off against his opponent Joe Biden in a debate.

Tonight is our chance to show voters across the country we are the party of law and order, economic growth, safety and civility. President Trump stands with our police and is offering a safe reopening of our economy, while a Biden presidency would shut our economy down indefinitely, and make our country a safe haven for lawlessness.

We must re-elect President Trump, and flip this seat to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi!

[If you agree with our message, please consider contributing $25 to our cause.](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=d9c4045530&e=16fac31a0f)

Thank you for your support!

Mariannette Miller-Meeks
